spell.name: Entreat Spirit
spell.text: You invite a spirit you’ve bonded with to bolster your mind. You gain a +1 status bonus to an Intelligence-, Wisdom-, or Charisma-based skill of your choice. Additionally, you gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against curse, death, emotion, and fear effects.
spell.requirement: You must be Bonded with a Spirit

heightened.text: The status bonus to the skill and your saving throws increases to +2.
The status bonus to the skill and your saving throws increases to +3.
